questions.question: You are a lecturer in a database management system course. A student, John, has submitted his final project. However, upon reviewing the project, you realize that John has submitted a project that is 2 marks short of the required 50 marks. What action should you take?
questions.hint: Consider the student's grade and the course requirements.

questions.question: A student, Emily, has submitted her assignment and noticed an error in one of the questions. She wants to check if the result will be affected if she corrects the error after the deadline.
questions.hint: Consider the timing and the grading process.

questions.question: You are the head of the database administration department and need to check the results of the recent exam. The results are currently being processed, but the database administration team is running behind schedule. What should you do?
questions.hint: Consider the time-sensitive nature of the results and the impact on the students.
